content.query:
delete from appl.elsevier_claims_age_by_year_t ;

insert into appl.elsevier_claims_age_by_year_t 
(
	token
    , dos_year
    , patient_age
)
SELECT distinct 
    a.token
    , try_cast(a.dos_year as integer) as dos_year
    , try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) as patient_age
from
    (
        SELECT distinct token, substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) as dos_year, patient_age
        FROM [customer].[stg_incr_claims_1_t] a 
        union
        SELECT distinct token, substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) as dos_year, patient_age
        FROM [customer].[stg_incr_claims_2_t] a 
        union
        SELECT distinct token, substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) as dos_year, patient_age
        FROM [customer].[stg_incr_claims_3_t] a 
        union
        SELECT distinct token, substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) as dos_year, patient_age
        FROM [customer].[stg_incr_claims_4_t] a 
    ) a
where 
    a.dos_year is not null
    and a.dos_year <> ''
    and try_cast(a.dos_year as integer) is not null
    and a.patient_age is not null
    and a.patient_age <> ''
    and try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) is not null
;
select count(*) from [appl].[elsevier_claims_corrected_age_t]; 62535788  6916304

select count(*) from [appl].[elsevier_inc_mortality_tokens_t];

insert into [appl].[elsevier_mortality_tokens_t]
(input_token)
select count(distinct input_token)
from customer.stg_incr_mortality_1_t
where
    deceased_match_indicator = 'Y'
    and ((len(date_of_death) = 4 and cast(date_of_death as integer) between 2000 and 2024)
                or (len(date_of_death) >= 6 and cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) between 1 and 12) and substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) between '200001' and '202408')
;
